name: Elementia, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: Elementia, S.A.B. de C.V. produces and sells building materials for the construction sector in the Americas. Its Cement division offers cement CPC 30 R, cement CPC 40, and construction cement products. The company's Metal Products division offers copper and copper-alloy products, such as tapes, sheets, LWC tubes, bars, connections, wires, keys, and forging copper products. Its Building Systems division provides fiber cement and plastic products, including tiles, corrugated roofing, tubes, siding, panels, molding, as well as water tanks, cisterns, septic tanks, seedbeds, coffers, slabs, half shells, plates, disposable cups, and polystyrene sheets. The company sells its products under the Cementos, Fortaleza, Giant, Keystone, Dragon Nacobre, Allura, Mexalit, Plycem, Eternit, Duralit, Fibraforte, and other brand names. The company is based in Mexico City, Mexico.
